mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rides (tenant_id, region_id, rider_id, status_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, pickup_address, destination_lat, destination_lng, destination_address, vehicle_type_id, estimated_fare, surge_multiplier, idempotency_key, requested_at, add_date) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{region.id}, #{riderId}, #{status.id}, #{pickupLat}, #{pickupLng}, #{pickupAddress}, #{destinationLat}, #{destinationLng}, #{destinationAddress}, #{vehicleType.id}, #{estimatedFare}, #{surgeMultiplier}, #{idempotencyKey}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rides WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_info IS NULL
SELECT * FROM rides WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.update:
UPDATE rides SET status_id = #{statusId}, update_date = NOW()
, completed_at = NOW()
, cancelled_at = NOW()
, started_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_info IS NULL
AND status_id = #{expectedStatusId}
UPDATE rides SET driver_id = #{driverId}, status_id = #{statusId}, matched_at = NOW(), update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status_id = 201 AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rides WHERE driver_id = #{driverId} AND status_id IN (203, 204, 205) AND delete_info IS NULL LIMIT 1
